# (Live Workshop) Get Free Google Analytics 4 Training!

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-07-08 17:00:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 919

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Trying to grow your website, but find Google Analytics 4
confusing?

All the answers for boosting traffic and sales are in your data,
but finding them can be tricky.

What if you could easily find the analytics that matter most to
your business? And do it in only 30 minutes?

Join our FREE live workshop on Wednesday, July 16th, at 10:30 AM
EST, and we'll teach you how:

👉 Google Analytics 4 Masterclass: Discover What's Working in 30
Minutes! ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..RhtTOCimn7XZ2Yp3huo45r_94GBg5VexlEMlwh--Kmo ) 👈

Your guide will be Zach Kwarta, the General Manager of
MonsterInsights. He's an expert at making analytics simple for
everyone.

Here's what you'll learn:

- How to Use Data for Growth: See what's working on your site so
you can get more traffic, subscribers, and sales.

- Analytics Made Easy: Find out how to get simple reports right
inside WordPress (no code needed!).

- Find the Best Reports: Learn which reports to look at so you
can make smart decisions quickly.

- Get Pro Tips: Receive special analytics tips from an expert to
help you get ahead.

Ready to finally understand your website analytics and use them
to grow your business?

👉 Yes, Save My Free Spot! 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..RhtTOCimn7XZ2Yp3huo45r_94GBg5VexlEMlwh--Kmo ) 👈

See you there,

Syed Balkhi
Founder of WPBeginner
